untranslatable_reason: Signal references 'confirmation line' which is not a standard defined indicator in the allowed list. The exact definition and calculation method of this pattern's confirmation line is not provided. Additionally, entry conditions reference statistical outcomes (65% rise rate in bull markets) that cannot be directly encoded as real-time price conditions. Used pivot point as a proxy for confirmation line, but this is an approximation.
translation_notes: Pattern name (AUTHOR_SILENT) indicates this is from Bulkowski's pattern recognition work. Interpreted 'confirmation line' as pivot support level. Entry requires price close below pivot (breakout DOWN) combined with strong downtrend signal (ADX > 25). Exit on pivot break above. Added reasonable stop-loss. Trend alignment enforced via regime filter TRENDING_DOWN. Note: Without the specific pattern definition from source, this uses pivot-based approximation rather than the true confirmation line calculation.
